description: Proposed OpenTelemetry attribute names for redacted ActionLineage evidence exports.

attributes.name: actionlineage.event_id
attributes.notes: Stable event identifier from the ActionLineage envelope.

attributes.name: actionlineage.event_type
attributes.notes: Known or preserved future event type string.

attributes.name: actionlineage.trace_id
attributes.notes: Trace identifier from the redacted event envelope.

attributes.name: actionlineage.run_id
attributes.notes: Agent run identifier from the redacted event envelope.

attributes.name: actionlineage.source.component
attributes.notes: Component that emitted the evidence event.

attributes.name: actionlineage.payload_json
attributes.notes: Redacted payload JSON string. Raw secrets and raw authorization material are never exported.

event_semantics.acknowledged: A successful tool response is represented as acknowledgement only.
event_semantics.observed: Independent observation must be represented with side-effect evidence.
event_semantics.verified: Verification requires independent or explicitly identified corroborating evidence.
event_semantics.absence: No observation recorded is not proof that a side effect did not occur.
